questions.title: Consecutive Array
questions.prompt: Given an unsorted array, find the length of the longest sequence of consecutive numbers in the array.

questions.title: Zero Matrix
questions.prompt: Given a boolean matrix, update it so that if any cell is true, all the cells in that row and column are true.

questions.title: Square Submatrix
questions.prompt: Given a 2D array of 1s and 0s, find the largest square subarray of all 1s.

questions.title: Matrix Search
questions.prompt: Given an n x m array where all rows and columns are in sorted order, write a function to determine whether the array contains an element x.

questions.title: Zero Sum Subarray
questions.prompt: Given an array, write a function to find any subarray that sums to zero, if one exists.

questions.title: Permutations
questions.prompt: Write a function that returns all permutations of a given list.

questions.title: N Stacks
questions.prompt: Implement N > 0 stacks using a single array to store all stack data. No stack should be full unless the entire array is full.

questions.title: Build Order
questions.prompt: Given a list of packages that need to be built and the dependencies for each package, determine a valid order in which to build the packages.

questions.title: Random Binary Tree
questions.prompt: Implement a binary tree with a method getRandomNode() that returns a random node.

questions.title: Lowest Common Ancestor
questions.prompt: Given two nodes in a binary tree, write a function to find the lowest common ancestor.

questions.title: Tree to Doubly Linked List
questions.prompt: Given a tree, write a function to convert it into a circular doubly linked list from left to right by only modifying the existing pointers.

questions.title: Longest Consecutive Branch
questions.prompt: Given a tree, write a function to find the length of the longest branch of nodes in increasing consecutive order.

questions.title: Balanced Binary Tree
questions.prompt: Given a binary tree, write a function to determine whether the tree is balanced.

questions.title: Binary Search Tree Verification
questions.prompt: Given a binary tree, write a function to test if the tree is a binary search tree.

questions.title: Smallest Change
questions.prompt: Given an input amount of change x, write a function to determine the minimum number of coins required to make that amount of change.

questions.title: Max Stacks
questions.prompt: Implement a LIFO stack that has push(), pop(), and max() functions, where max() returns the maximum value in the stack. All of these functions should run in O(1) time.

questions.title: Two Missing Numbers
questions.prompt: Given an array containing all the numbers from 1 to n except two, find the two missing numbers.

questions.title: Rotate Bits
questions.prompt: Given a number, write a function to rotate the bits (i.e. circular shift).

questions.title: Three Sum
questions.prompt: Given a list of integers, write a function that returns all sets of 3 numbers in the list, a, b, and c, so that a + b + c == 0.

questions.title: Autocomplete
questions.prompt: Write an autocomplete class that returns all dictionary words with a given prefix.

examples.input: dict {abc, acd, bcd, def, a, aba}, prefix "a"

questions.title: Kth Most Frequent String
questions.prompt: Given a list of strings, write a function to get the kth most frequently occurring string.
